info.title: Jaramarket API
info.description: Jaramarket Meals Marketplace API for Customer and Vendor mobile applications

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all ingredients in the system.

post.description: Add a new ingredient to the system.

delete.description: Remove an ingredient from the system.

post.description: Upload an image for a specific ingredient.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile details, including wallet balance and location.

put.description: Update user's basic information such as name, phone, and location.

post.description: Upload and update the user's profile picture (avatar).

get.description: Retrieve a list of active vendors with optional filters for name, business name, and category.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by vendor name or business name

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific vendor.
Retrieve all product categories.
Retrieve a list of products (ingredients) with filters for vendor, category, and name.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific product.

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the user's email address to initiate password reset.

get.description: Retrieve a list of orders placed by the authenticated customer.

post.description: Create a new order with multiple products or ingredients.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific order.

post.description: Initialize a Paystack transaction for an order.
Verify a Paystack transaction and update order status to 'paid'.

get.description: Retrieve history of successful payments for the user.

All products (filterable).
Requires: ?state_id=
Retrieve all categories specifically for vendors.

post.description: Resets the user's password using the OTP and email.

get.description: Retrieve all reviews for a specific vendor.

post.description: Submit a rating and comment for a specific vendor.
Vendors can leave a review and rating for a customer after a transaction.

get.description: Retrieve all reviews received by a customer.

post.description: Authenticate using a social provider (google, facebook, apple). The mobile app should provide the token obtained from the provider.

token.description: The access token or ID token from the provider

post.description: Creates a new user account (Customer or Vendor). A verification OTP will be sent to the email address.

message.example: An OTP has been sent to your email address.

post.description: Resends a new 6-digit OTP to the user's email address.
Validates the 6-digit OTP sent to the user's email. On success, returns a Sanctum Bearer token for immediate login.
Authenticates a user and returns a Sanctum Bearer token.
Revokes the current access token.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated vendor's profile, including business details and categories.

post.description: Upload a logo for the vendor business.
Upload a banner image for the vendor business.

get.description: Retrieve a list of ingredients available to the vendor based on their categories. Note: Ingredients are managed by Admin.
Retrieve details of a specific ingredient.
Retrieve a list of order items containing ingredients managed by the vendor.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, accepted, rejected, processing, completed)

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific order item.

put.description: Accept, reject, or mark an order item as delivered/completed.

get.description: Retrieve vendor's total and monthly earnings, and wallet balance.
Retrieve history of bank transfers/payouts.

post.description: Submit a request to transfer funds from vendor wallet to bank.

get.description: Clickable link sent via email. Validates the hash and redirects the user back to the Flutter app via deep link.
Retrieve the authenticated user's wallet balance and status.

post.description: Initialize a transaction to add funds to the wallet via Paystack.
Initiate a transfer from wallet to a verified bank account.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all wallet transactions (credits and debits).
Retrieve the authenticated user's cart items.

post.description: Add a product to the user's cart. If the product already exists, the quantity is updated.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific cart (usually only one active cart exists per user).

put.description: Update the quantity of a specific item in the cart.

item_id.description: The ID of the CartItem record

delete.description: Remove a specific item from the cart.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The ID of the CartItem record

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user.

put.description: Mark a specific notification as read.

post.description: Save the user's Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications.
